metadata.dedup_review: 26 uncertain signals reviewed — all confirmed as NEW (distinct from matched signals)

signals.title: AWS launches AI agent platform for healthcare
signals.summary: AWS enters vertical AI agent market with healthcare-specific platform for scheduling, documentation, and verification.

signals.title: US considering sweeping new chip export controls — universal oversight
signals.summary: Draft proposal for universal US chip export oversight represents potential paradigm shift in semiconductor geopolitics.

signals.title: BYD Blade Battery 2.0 with 5-minute flash charging at 1.5 MW
signals.summary: BYD's 1.5 MW charging capability could eliminate range anxiety — paradigm shift for EV adoption.

signals.title: Pentagon designates Anthropic as supply-chain risk
signals.summary: First American AI company designated as DOD supply-chain risk despite ongoing military AI use — signals deep tensions.

signals.title: OpenAI launches GPT-5.4 — most capable frontier model
signals.summary: GPT-5.4 Pro and Thinking versions continue rapid frontier model iteration cycle.

signals.title: Luma launches multimodal creative AI agents
signals.summary: Multi-modal AI agent orchestration for creative work spanning text, images, video, and audio.

signals.title: Cursor launches agentic coding Automations system
signals.summary: Event-triggered autonomous coding agents represent shift toward fully autonomous development workflows.

signals.title: AI voice agents democratize M&A due diligence
signals.summary: AI voice agents conducting customer interviews for PE firms, disrupting management consulting model.

signals.title: Online harassment enters AI era — autonomous targeting without instruction
signals.summary: AI agents autonomously research and target individuals for harassment — new frontier in AI harm with no accountability framework.

signals.title: Claude used for military target identification in Iran strikes
signals.summary: AI systems used for active military targeting in real conflict — crosses ethical threshold for AI in warfare.

signals.title: Startup proposes stopping lightning with metallic chaff for wildfire prevention
signals.summary: Novel geoengineering approach to wildfire prevention raises questions about unintended environmental consequences.

signals.title: OpenAI secures classified Pentagon military contract
signals.summary: OpenAI enters classified military space after Anthropic's supply-chain designation — AI companies choosing sides in military AI.

signals.title: EPA proposes delaying Clean Water Act compliance requirements
signals.summary: EPA delays hazardous substance facility response requirements, signaling regulatory rollback in environmental protection.

signals.title: DOT national transportation digital infrastructure modernization strategy
signals.summary: Federal push toward connected transportation infrastructure modernization.

signals.title: Iran national emergency continuation — Presidential declaration
signals.summary: Continuation of national emergency framework reflects ongoing Middle East military escalation.

signals.title: ITC investigation into display devices and streaming components
signals.summary: Trade protection action in consumer electronics sector.

signals.title: Chile becomes first in Americas to achieve WHO leprosy elimination
signals.summary: Three decades of sustained public health surveillance achieves elimination milestone.

signals.title: Evo 2: AI trained on 9 trillion DNA base pairs for genome modeling
signals.summary: Foundation model for genomics across all life domains — paradigm shift in computational biology and synthetic biology.

signals.title: Merlin: Foundation model for medical CT scan diagnosis
signals.summary: Vision-language model achieves strong diagnostic performance across multiple hospital sites in radiology.

signals.title: Millimeter-scale hexagonal diamond synthesized
signals.summary: New material synthesis method reveals insights into diamond formation with potential industrial applications.

signals.title: Tropical insects face critical thermal tolerance limits — biodiversity at risk
signals.summary: Tropical insects approaching thermal limits threatens ecosystem services and food production chains.

signals.title: AI in warfare — Iran conflict highlights military AI applications
signals.summary: Nature analysis of AI deployment in active warfare raises autonomous weapons governance concerns.

signals.title: Cancer metastasis mechanism: Glucocorticoid receptor immune evasion
signals.summary: New mechanism for cancer spread reveals potential therapeutic target for breast cancer metastasis.

signals.title: Taara: 25 Gbps fiber-speed via open-air laser links
signals.summary: Free-space optical technology achieving fiber-competitive speeds could bridge global connectivity gaps.

signals.title: Floating offshore wind turbine with integrated underwater data center
signals.summary: Convergence of offshore wind energy and data center computing with seawater cooling — novel sustainability approach.

signals.title: Modular EV battery design prioritizing owner repairability
signals.summary: University prototype challenges sealed-battery norm with owner-serviceable modular EV battery.

signals.title: AI-human collaboration achieves mathematical proof verification milestone
signals.summary: Gauss AI formalized complex sphere-packing proofs in days — unprecedented AI-human collaboration in mathematics.

signals.title: Middle East escalation Day 6: NATO intercepts Iranian missile targeting Turkey
signals.summary: NATO's direct involvement via missile interception marks critical escalation threshold in Middle East conflict.

signals.title: Women's rights regressing worldwide — UN Women report
signals.summary: Rising conflicts intensify gender-based violence with justice gap from discriminatory laws.

signals.title: AI reshaping working conditions: algorithmic management concerns
signals.summary: UN report on AI fundamentally altering labor dynamics through algorithmic management of workers.

signals.title: UN forms independent AI advisory group for responsible AI governance
signals.summary: UN Secretary-General forms AI advisory group, strengthening international AI governance architecture.

signals.title: Iran crisis: Civilian casualties including schoolgirls, mass displacement
signals.summary: Ongoing strikes causing civilian deaths and mass displacement, hindering humanitarian operations.

signals.title: Post-IEEPA: Limits of tariff-driven economic statecraft
signals.summary: Supreme Court IEEPA ruling constrains executive tariff authority — structural shift in US trade policy capacity.

signals.title: Danger of broader Iran war — expert analysis
signals.summary: Multiple experts analyze risks of conflict escalation including NATO, Gulf states, and nuclear dimensions.

signals.title: China NPC 2026: Economic stimulus, tech self-sufficiency, Taiwan priorities
signals.summary: China's annual legislative session revealing economic and tech policy directions with geopolitical implications.

signals.title: Americans most negative about compatriots' morality — 25-country survey
signals.summary: US ranks highest in negative moral perception of fellow citizens — deep social trust crisis indicator.

signals.title: AI tool injection: Malicious GitHub issues compromise 4,000 developer machines
signals.summary: New attack vector: malicious issue titles exploit AI coding assistants to install malware — AI supply chain vulnerability.

signals.title: Anthropic: Young workers 14% reduction in job entry for AI-exposed occupations
signals.summary: First quantitative evidence of AI displacement effect on young workers ages 22-25 entering exposed occupations.

signals.title: Wikipedia mass admin account compromise forces read-only mode
signals.summary: Foundational internet knowledge infrastructure compromised — highlights vulnerability of key platforms.

signals.title: Google OpenTitan open-source security chip enters production
signals.summary: Open-source silicon root of trust chip reaches production milestone for transparent hardware security.

signals.title: Proton Mail assists FBI in unmasking anonymous protester
signals.summary: Privacy service promises vs government compliance — fundamental tension in digital rights landscape.

signals.title: Alibaba PageAgent: Open-source AI agents embedded in web frontends
signals.summary: Browser-embedded AI agents for web app automation — agentic interface paradigm expansion.

signals.title: UK emissions fall 2.4% — coal at 400-year low since 1600
signals.summary: UK emissions at lowest since 1872, coal at lowest since 1600 — significant decarbonization milestone.

signals.title: EU Industrial Accelerator Act: Public procurement for low-carbon manufacturing
signals.summary: EU uses procurement power to drive decarbonization — could save 30.6M tonnes CO2 by 2030.

signals.title: China 15th five-year plan: 3.8% carbon intensity reduction, transition fund
signals.summary: China's 17% carbon intensity reduction target by 2030 and clean energy transition fund signal accelerating commitments.

signals.title: Climate change renders regions uninsurable — insurance catastrophe
signals.summary: Growing uninsurability crisis as climate change exceeds insurance industry capacity — systemic economic risk.

signals.title: Instrumentalisation crisis: Reducing human values to utilitarian outcomes
signals.summary: Philosophical critique of contemporary society reducing all values to means-ends calculations.
